EditTextPreference.android:title: Fiken.no URL to Contact REST API
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Fiken.no URL to Contact REST API. Default: https://api.fiken.no/api/v2/companies/<companySlug>/contacts

EditTextPreference.android:title: Fiken.no API Bearer key
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Bearer token used for authenticating against the Fiken v2 API.
